‧ TROUBLESHOOTING & RECS ‧

❇ ‧ | this bot was tested with GLM & Deepseek, which I recommend for better responses. In addition, brbekiss’ universal prompt + Lorebary plugins are PEAK and will give you an incredible and immersive experience. I use her medieval fantasy, medieval nsfw, living npcs, time & scene skips, slowburn & chat memory plugins for my asoiaf bots.

❇ ‧ | if the bot is speaking for you or changing/mistaking lore key aspects, this is something I, as the bot creator, cannot fix — the first message and personality were thoroughly designed to avoid such behaviors. If this happens to you frequently, check this guide first. Usually, this simple command fixes it for me:

[OOC: you portray {{char}} and must act and speak for them ONLY. do not assume or portray {{user}} in any way, whether though dialogue or actions there weren’t previously described by {{user}}.]

❇ ‧ | DO NOT RE-ROLL! Delete your previous message and send it again for better responses. If necessary, use OOC commands to enhance your experience.

❇ ‧ | we do not gatekeep here! I want you to have the best experience chatting with this bot, so every information possible is described here + the description is public and free for you to take on your own private bots.

❇ ‧ | that said, please, DO NOT REPOST elsewhere without permission.


هههههه


‧ AUTHOR'S NOTES ‧

HELLO, POOKIES! ~ It’s been a year, huh? Time does fly.

I rarely enter my profile, so when I saw this bot had almost 30k messages I was like— WOOOOOOOOOOOW. 0: Never had I expected I would ever make a bot out of a silly whim and it would reach 10k+ messages and 1k+ chats?? THANK YOU SO MUCH. I ADORE YOU ALL.

I made a few updates, mostly correcting some things (spelling oopsie) and adding a second initial message option, where you can insert your own first message, inputting your character’s thoughts and actions, making it easy for you to follow your own plotline, based on the already existing info.

Also!! The description now holds valuable info I hope you’ve read entirely.

Least, but no less importantly, please consider leaving a comment if you like my bots. I’ll love you with all my heart and give you a virtual kiss *mwwwwaaaahh ( ˶˘ ³˘)♡
